mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( NOTI_ID, MEMBER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, NOTI_MSG, LINK_URL, IS_READ, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTIFICATION.NEXTVAL, #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notiType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notiMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT NOTI_ID AS notiId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, NOTI_MSG AS notiMsg, LINK_URL AS linkUrl, IS_READ AS isRead, CREATE_DATE AS createDate FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC, NOTI_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
